summary: A Go-based modular testing framework with plugin support that detects, runs, and reports on schema assertions, recently expanded with HTTP endpoint validation and config inheritance.
concerns: uncommitted changes (3 modified, 2 untracked) suggest instability
deeply nested session directories could become unmanageable
suggestions: consolidate configuration into a single standard location
commit or stash the current working tree changes
flatten or archive old session directories
add integration tests for the new HTTP and JSON field assertions
